title: Restructure Hosted Backend as Top-Level Directory

phases.name: Create directories and extract shared types

tasks.title: Create shared/types/ directory
tasks.description: mkdir -p shared/types. This is where all extracted contract files will live.

tasks.title: Create hosted/ top-level directory
tasks.description: mkdir -p hosted. Top-level deployment boundary for Vercel-bundled code.

tasks.title: Create back/guardrail/ and back/intelligence/ directories
tasks.description: mkdir -p back/guardrail/execution back/guardrail/policy back/intelligence/llm-router. Destination for local runtime code flattened from back/services/.

tasks.title: Move pure contract files to shared/types/
tasks.description: git mv the 5 pure-contract files: executionGatewayContracts.ts, policyContracts.ts, llmDecisionContracts.ts, llmRouterContracts.ts, hostedAuthMiddlewareContracts.ts, hostedErrorMiddlewareContracts.ts. No splitting needed — these contain only types, interfaces, enums, constants.

tasks.title: Split evaluationContracts.ts into types + validators
tasks.description: Move type exports (HostedDecision, HostedRiskLevel, EvaluateActionRequest, etc.) and constants (HOSTED_DECISIONS, HOSTED_RISK_LEVELS, etc.) to shared/types/evaluationContracts.ts. Extract runtime validators (isHostedDecision, isHostedRiskLevel, validateEvaluateActionRequest, isRecord, isNonEmptyString, isLocalFindingSeverity) to hosted/evaluate/evaluationValidators.ts. Create hosted/evaluate/evaluationContracts.ts as a re-export barrel that imports types from @shared/ and validators from ./evaluationValidators.

tasks.title: Split auditContracts.ts into types + validators
tasks.description: Move type exports and constants (DEFAULT_AUDIT_QUERY_LIMIT, MAX_AUDIT_QUERY_LIMIT) to hosted/audit/auditContracts.ts as re-exports from @shared/. Extract runtime validators (validateAuditWriteRequest, validateAuditQueryParams, normalizeAuditQueryLimit, isRecord, isNonEmptyString) to hosted/audit/auditValidators.ts. Note: auditContracts stays in hosted/ since it's only consumed by hosted code.

tasks.title: Add @hosted/* path alias to tsconfig.json
tasks.description: Add "@hosted/*": ["hosted/*"] to compilerOptions.paths in tsconfig.json. Existing @back/* and @shared/* aliases are already present.

tasks.title: Move hosted root files
tasks.description: git mv back/services/hosted/{app.ts,appContracts.ts,server.ts,serverContracts.ts,app.test.ts} to hosted/.

tasks.title: Move hosted feature directories
tasks.description: git mv back/services/hosted/{audit,evaluate,health,llm,policies,policy} to hosted/. http/ moves too. Preserve internal directory structure.

tasks.title: Move guardrail runtime files
tasks.description: git mv: back/services/guardrail/execution/executionGateway.ts → back/guardrail/execution/, back/services/guardrail/debugLogger.ts → back/guardrail/, back/services/guardrail/policy/* → back/guardrail/policy/.

tasks.title: Move intelligence runtime
tasks.description: git mv back/services/intelligence/llm-router/llmRouterPrompt.ts → back/intelligence/llm-router/.

tasks.title: Update imports in hosted/ files
tasks.description: Rewrite all relative imports in hosted/ files: ../../guardrail/execution/executionGatewayContracts → @shared/executionGatewayContracts, ../../guardrail/execution/executionGateway → @back/guardrail/execution/executionGateway, ../../guardrail/debugLogger → @back/guardrail/debugLogger, ../../guardrail/policy/* → @back/guardrail/policy/*. Files: policyContracts, loadPolicy, policyEngine, evaluationService, llmDecisionAdapter, llmDecisionSanitizer.

tasks.title: Update imports in back/guardrail/ files
tasks.description: Rewrite imports in back/guardrail/policy/policyEvaluationResult.ts and policySchema.ts: ../../hosted/policy/policyContracts → @shared/policyContracts, ../execution/executionGatewayContracts → @shared/executionGatewayContracts.

tasks.title: Update imports in back/services/mcp/
tasks.description: Rewrite imports in mcp/proxy/: mcpHostedClient.ts, mcpProxyDispatcher.ts, mcpProxyContracts.ts, mcpEvaluationRequest.ts, mcpHostedClientContracts.ts. Replace ../../hosted/evaluate/evaluationContracts → @shared/evaluationContracts, ../../hosted/llm/llmRouterContracts → @shared/llmRouterContracts. Note: mcpProxyDispatcher.ts imports runtime adapters from hosted — import from @hosted/llm/llmDecisionAdapter and @hosted/llm/llmRouterAdapter (known dependency direction issue, documented in tech spec).

tasks.title: Update imports in back/services/domains/
tasks.description: Rewrite imports in transfer/transferGateway.ts, transfer/transferGatewayContracts.ts, swap/swapGateway.ts, swap/swapGatewayContracts.ts, conditional-parking-lot/conditionalGateway.ts, conditionalGatewayContracts.ts. Replace ../../hosted/policy/* → @hosted/policy/*, ../../hosted/policy/policyContracts → @shared/policyContracts, ../../guardrail/execution/executionGatewayContracts → @shared/executionGatewayContracts.

tasks.title: Update imports in test files
tasks.description: Rewrite imports in back/services/__tests__/*.test.ts: hybrid-e2e.test.ts, hybridContracts.test.ts, transferGateway.test.ts, swapGateway.test.ts, conditionalGateway.test.ts, policyEngine.test.ts, llmDecisionAdapter.test.ts, llmDecisionSanitizer.test.ts, llmRouterAdapter.test.ts, mcpProxyLlmDecisionIntegration.test.ts, loadPolicy.test.ts, executionGateway.test.ts, evaluationService.test.ts. Replace ../hosted/* → @hosted/* or @shared/* as appropriate.

tasks.title: Update Vercel adapter import
tasks.description: Update api/hosted/[[...route]].ts: change ../../back/services/hosted/app → @hosted/app.

tasks.title: Update package.json hosted:dev script
tasks.description: Change hosted:dev from "bun back/services/hosted/server.ts" to "bun hosted/server.ts".

tasks.title: Update vitest.back.config.ts
tasks.description: Add resolve.alias block mapping @back, @shared, @hosted to filesystem paths. Expand include array to cover hosted/**/*.test.ts alongside back/**/*. Add hosted/ and shared/ to exclude if needed for node_modules.

tasks.title: Update eslint.config.js if needed
tasks.description: Check if eslint.config.js references back/services/hosted or back/services/guardrail paths. Update if present. Current package.json lint script targets 'app back/services' — may need to add 'hosted' and 'back/guardrail'.

tasks.title: Remove empty old directories
tasks.description: rm -rf back/services/hosted, back/services/guardrail (if fully emptied), back/services/intelligence (if fully emptied). Verify with ls that they're gone.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript compilation check
tasks.description: npx tsc --noEmit. Must pass with zero errors. Fix any type resolution failures.

tasks.title: Grep for stale import paths
tasks.description: Verify no TS source references old paths: back/services/hosted, ../../guardrail/execution/executionGatewayContracts, ../../guardrail/debugLogger, ../../hosted/. Exclude docs/ directory.

tasks.title: Run full test suite
tasks.description: npm run test:back. All tests must pass without assertion changes. Verify test discovery covers both back/ and hosted/ locations.

tasks.title: Verify hosted dev server starts
tasks.description: bun hosted/server.ts and curl localhost:3001/health. Confirm the server boots and responds.
